verified_claims: Installed TestFlight Build Info provenance passed for clean committed source.
Today launch surface rendered with natural-data Continue rows.
One natural-data Home protocol run Continue row opened the active run sheet.

historical_attempts.summary: Initial TestFlight Build Info screenshot reported build 20260417081911, but the stamped commit's committed project.pbxproj had CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION 20260417081904.
Installed app still reported bundle version 20260417081911 while local committed source reported 20260417081904.
Installed app reported build 20260417081912, but no committed main source state contained that CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION.
Installed app reported build 20260513172951, but Build Info showed Git status dirty and a dirty source stamp.
Installed app reported build 20260513202827 from clean commit adb5de52bf90233e64257d5c0aa1dc37f59a6bf2, whose committed Xcode project has the same CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION.
